title: canthium lasianthoides
intro: Canthium lasianthoides, also known as the African mistletoe, is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Canthium lasianthoides include reducing pain and swelling, as well as acting as an antimicrobial agent to prevent infections. Canthium lasianthoides is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is used as a powder or tincture for its medicinal properties.
